title: OGE Energy elects board of directors at annual meeting
author: Prnewswire
description: OGE Energy Corp. held its 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders, electing 8 board members and declaring an unchanged quarterly dividend of $0.425 per share. CEO Sean Trauschke highlighted the company's strong 2025 financial results and continued investments in reliability and infrastructure to meet growing demand while maintaining affordable rates.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company reported strong financial results in 2025, demonstrated continued disciplined investment in infrastructure and reliability, maintained low rates for customers, and declared an unchanged dividend, indicating stable operations and shareholder confidence. CEO commentary emphasized delivering strong results while positioning for future growth.

title: OGE Energy Corp. reports 2025 results and outlook for 2026
author: Prnewswire
description: OGE Energy Corp. reported 2025 earnings of $2.32 per diluted share, up from $2.19 in 2024, driven by higher operating revenue from capital investment recovery and strong load growth. The company provided 2026 guidance of $2.38-$2.48 per diluted share (midpoint $2.43) and expects 5-7% annual EPS growth through 2028. A quarterly dividend of $0.425 per share was declared.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company delivered strong 2025 results with EPS growth of 5.9% year-over-year ($2.32 vs $2.19), driven by higher operating revenue and strong load growth. 2026 guidance shows continued growth trajectory with 5-7% expected annual EPS growth through 2028. Dividend increase and management confidence in future performance support positive outlook.

title: OGE Energy Corp. Board of Directors declares quarterly dividend
author: Prnewswire
description: OGE Energy Corp. announced a first quarter dividend of $0.425 per common share, to be paid on January 30, 2026, to shareholders of record on January 5, 2026.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company is consistently providing shareholder returns through a quarterly dividend, indicating financial stability and commitment to investors

title: OGE Energy Corp. appoints treasurer
author: Prnewswire
description: OGE Energy Corp. appointed Jason Bailey as Treasurer, a 23-year company veteran currently serving as director of investor relations. The company's Board of Directors also approved a fourth quarter dividend of $0.425 per common share.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company made a strategic internal promotion of a long-term employee to a key financial role, demonstrating confidence in its leadership and organizational development. The CEO's supportive statement and the declaration of a quarterly dividend further indicate a positive corporate outlook.
